summary: Iteration 152: Tested preventivi numbering bug fixes. All 10 backend tests passed. Key fixes verified: 1) Counter syncs with max existing number before create - prevents gaps when counter is ahead, 2) Counter recalculates to max existing after delete, 3) Clone also syncs counter, 4) API accepts limit=500 (was 100), 5) Response includes accurate 'total' field, 6) Frontend correctly uses 'total' field and limit=500.
seed_data_creation: Test user created: TEST_PREV_NUM_*, session_prev_num_* - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 152 verified preventivi numbering bug fixes: 1) Counter gap prevention working - create 3, delete last, create new gets deleted number (PRV-2026-0004 -> delete -> new gets 0004 again); 2) Counter sync when ahead - if counter is artificially at 108 but max existing is 8, new preventivo gets 9; 3) Clone syncs counter; 4) List API accepts limit=500-1000, returns 'total' field; 5) Frontend PreventiviPage.js uses data.total for count display. Collection: 'preventivi', counter collection: 'document_counters' with counter_id 'PRV-{user_id}-{year}'.
verified_features: GET /api/preventivi/ - response includes 'total' field with accurate count
POST /api/preventivi/ - syncs counter with max existing number before create
POST /api/preventivi/ - if counter=108 but max=8, next number is 9 not 109
DELETE /api/preventivi/{id} - recalculates counter to max existing after delete
Counter gap prevention - create 3 (#2,#3,#4), delete #4, create new -> gets #4 again
POST /api/preventivi/{id}/clone - syncs counter before generating new number
Frontend uses data.total from API (not array.length)
Frontend uses limit=500 in API call
